item.name: Floating Saucer
item.description:
Far less welcome at a mess hall table than an actual saucer, as these odd creatures taste rather like a sailor's subligar. Apparently.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: When viewed from a distance, could be mistaken for an upturned porcelain saucer. Even when observed from close proximity, the faint pattern even resembles the remnants of a picture rendered in gold leaf.
